codeReview.summary: Feature scope is satisfied: the commit adds focused regressions for create_at and upsert_at return-path identity on plain RecordId-backed models, and the reviewed baseline normalization seam preserves object-form RecordId ids while earlier get_record/delete roundtrip coverage remains intact.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill still says workers must write tests first and confirm they fail before implementing, but this worker reasonably documented a baseline-already-fixed case and added the missing regression proof directly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback notes the deviation because production behavior was already present in the authoritative baseline, while the commit 4aec03508fdde7e31580859e908c78967243db36 only adds regression tests in core/tests/integration_db.rs.

summary: Pass. No blocking issues found: the feature-owned commit is correctly scoped to regression coverage, verifies create_at/upsert_at preserve full RecordId identity for plain RecordId-backed models, and does not disturb the existing get_record/delete roundtrip proof.
